title: Resources

# 📚 Resources & Support

Where to go when you need help:

| Resource | What it's for | Link |
|----------|---------------|------|
| 🖥️ **IT Help Desk** | Hardware, software, and access issues | [ServiceNow](https://www.servicenow.com) |
| 👤 **HR Portal** | Benefits, time off, and company policies | [Workday](https://www.workday.com) |
| 📖 **Internal Wiki** | Documentation, runbooks, and how-to guides | [Confluence](https://www.atlassian.com/software/confluence) |
| 👔 **Your Manager** | Role-specific questions and career growth | [Schedule a 1:1](https://calendar.google.com) |
| 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 **Onboarding Buddy** | A teammate here to help you settle in | [Slack #new-hires](https://slack.com) |

> 🎉 **You're almost done!** Click **Finish** on the next screen to
> wrap up your onboarding.
